Session Quality Governor — Interactive Simulator

Drag the sliders to simulate a session. See how Claude's injected context and behavior change in real-time.

S
100/100
Optimal — full creativity
Context Fill15%
Compactions0
Session Age (min)5
Decisions Made0
What Claude sees on this turn

This is injected into additionalContext on every UserPromptSubmit. Claude reads it silently and adjusts behavior. The user never sees it.

Before / After — context-exhaustion-warner.ts

Single file change. No new hooks, no new skills, no new dependencies. ~60 lines added to an existing 170-line file.

Before — Single signal (170 lines)
// context-exhaustion-warner.ts // ONLY reads: context fill % // ONLY fires: at 70/80/90% thresholds // SILENT below 70% const TIERS = [ { pct: 90, level: 'CRITICAL', message: 'Context 90%+. Commit NOW.' }, { pct: 80, level: 'WARNING', message: 'Context 80%+. Wrap up.' }, { pct: 70, level: 'NOTICE', message: 'Context 70%+. Save progress.' }, ]; export function contextExhaustionWarner(input) { const pct = readContextPercentage(sessionId); // Below 70%? → SILENT. No injection. if (pct < 70) return outputSilentSuccess(); // Find tier, inject warning const tier = TIERS.find(t => pct >= t.pct); return { additionalContext: `[Context \${tier.level}] \${tier.message}` }; } // ❌ No quality score // ❌ No compaction awareness // ❌ No session age tracking // ❌ No decision density // ❌ Silent for 70% of session lifetime // ❌ Claude has NO quality awareness
After — Multi-signal governor (~230 lines)
// context-exhaustion-warner.ts (ENHANCED) // Reads: ctx%, compaction state, decisions, age // Fires: EVERY TURN (quality line always present) // + Threshold escalations + Behavioral directives // ── NEW: Quality score computation ────────── function computeQuality(ctx, compactions, ageMin, decisions) { let score = 100; // Fill penalty: 0-47 pts (scales with ctx%) if (ctx > 85) score -= 25 + (ctx-85) * 1.5; else if (ctx > 70) score -= 10 + (ctx-70); else if (ctx > 50) score -= (ctx-50) * 0.5; // Compaction: -8 per (max 3 counted) score -= Math.min(compactions, 3) * 8; // Age: -5/-10/-15 at 30/60/120 min if (ageMin > 120) score -= 15; else if (ageMin > 60) score -= 10; else if (ageMin > 30) score -= 5; // Productivity bonus if (decisions/ageMin*60 > 3) score += 5; return clamp(score, 0, 100); } export function contextExhaustionWarner(input) { const pct = readContextPercentage(sessionId); const state = readSessionState(); const decisions = countDecisions(); const age = sessionAgeMinutes(); const score = computeQuality(...); const grade = toGrade(score); // ✅ ALWAYS inject quality line (every turn) let ctx = `[Session Q:\${score}/\${grade} ...]`; // Threshold escalation (same as before) if (pct >= 70) ctx += escalationWarning(...); // ✅ NEW: Behavioral directive at C/D/F if (grade <= 'C') ctx += behavioralDirective(grade); return { additionalContext: ctx }; } // ✅ Quality score on EVERY turn // ✅ Compaction-aware (reads pre-compact state) // ✅ Session age tracking // ✅ Decision density bonus // ✅ Claude self-regulates via grade // ✅ ~15ms total (3 file reads)
Data Sources — All Pre-Existing

No new infrastructure. The governor reads files that other OrchestKit hooks already write.

DataSource FileWritten ByRead Cost
Context fill %/tmp/ork-ctx-pct-{session}.txtStatusLine bridge (existing)~2ms
Compaction count + history.claude/logs/sessions/{id}-state.jsonpre-compact-saver.ts (existing)~5ms
Decision count.claude/logs/decisions.jsonldecision-history.ts (existing)~5ms
Session start timeprocess.env.CLAUDE_SESSION_START or state fileCC runtime / SessionStart hook~0ms
What Changes
AspectBeforeAfter
Signals tracked1 (context fill %)4 (fill, compactions, age, decisions)
When firesOnly at 70/80/90% thresholdsEvery turn (quality line) + thresholds
What's injectedWarning text onlyQuality score + grade + warnings + behavioral directives
Claude awarenessKnows context is fillingKnows quality score, grade, and what behavior is expected
User action neededUser must decide when to commitNone — Claude self-regulates
Token cost~30 tokens at thresholds~30 tokens every turn + ~50 at thresholds
Performance~5ms (1 file read)~15ms (3 file reads + score computation)
Lines of code170~230 (+60 lines)
New files—0
New hooks—0
New skills—0
Behavioral Modes

Claude self-regulates based on the quality grade. No user action needed — the grade is in context, Claude reads it naturally.

Quality Score Computation

Computed in ~15ms from 3 existing data files. No new infrastructure.

Example 2-Hour Session

Watch how quality degrades naturally and how the governor responds at each stage.

TimeCtx%CompactAgeDecScoreGradeClaude Behavior
0:003%00m0100SNormal operation
0:1015%010m3100SNormal operation
0:2532%025m7100SNormal operation
0:4055%040m1290ASlightly more concise
0:5572%055m1673BEfficiency mode — finish current task
1:0583%065m1854CConservation — commit, suggest /compact
1:1035%170m1972BRecovered after /compact
1:3068%190m2468CConservation mode again
1:5086%1110m2842DSTOP — commit everything, handoff
1:5530%2115m2951CWinding down after 2nd compact
2:1060%2130m3240DSTOP — session should end
